properties.name: sftp.host
properties.description: SFTP host used for remote log discovery and transfer.

properties.name: sftp.port
properties.description: SFTP SSH port.

properties.name: sftp.username
properties.description: SFTP username.

properties.name: sftp.private.key
properties.description: Local private key path used for SFTP authentication.

properties.name: sftp.private.key.passphrase
properties.description: Passphrase for the SFTP private key.

properties.name: sftp.remote.run.as
properties.description: Optional remote user context for SFTP shell commands.

properties.name: sftp.payload.log.dir
properties.description: Remote payload log directory scanned for integration evidence.

properties.name: local.log.dir
properties.description: Local root directory where retrieved log evidence is written.

properties.name: local.log.retention.days
properties.description: Number of days to retain local log evidence.

properties.name: sftp.grep.retry.count
properties.description: Maximum retry count for remote log search attempts.

properties.name: sftp.grep.retry.wait.ms
properties.description: Wait time in milliseconds between remote log search retries.

properties.name: sftp.command.timeout.ms
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each SFTP command.

properties.name: sftp.keepalive.interval.ms
properties.description: SSH keep-alive interval in milliseconds.

properties.name: sftp.search.modified.within.days
properties.description: Only remote files modified within this many days are eligible for discovery and transfer.

properties.name: sftp.correlation.max.depth
properties.description: Maximum recursive correlation depth for BookingID, JobID, and CorrID expansion.

properties.name: sftp.correlation.max.tokens
properties.description: Maximum total correlation tokens allowed during expansion.

properties.name: sftp.correlation.max.jobids
properties.description: Maximum JobIDs allowed during correlation expansion.

properties.name: sftp.correlation.max.tokens.per.search
properties.description: Maximum correlation tokens included in a single remote search batch.

properties.name: sftp.correlation.max.batches.per.depth
properties.description: Maximum remote search batches allowed per correlation depth.

properties.name: sftp.block.max.matches.per.file
properties.description: Maximum block starts captured per remote file.

properties.name: sftp.local.min.block.lines
properties.description: Minimum local evidence lines required before a file is considered usable.

properties.name: sftp.log.name.filter.enabled
properties.description: Whether remote log discovery restricts candidate files by known log filename patterns.

properties.name: rest.endpoint
properties.description: REST endpoint used by the integration execution flow.

properties.name: rest.api.key
properties.description: API key used when invoking the configured REST endpoint.

properties.name: rest.method
properties.description: HTTP method used by the APIGEE REST trigger.

properties.name: rest.accept
properties.description: Accept header used by the APIGEE REST trigger.

properties.name: rest.content.type
properties.description: Content-Type header used by the APIGEE REST trigger.

properties.name: soap.transport
properties.description: VRP SOAP transport mode: http or jms.

properties.name: soap.endpoint
properties.description: HTTP endpoint used by the VRP SOAP trigger when soap.transport=http.

properties.name: soap.action
properties.description: SOAPAction header used by the VRP SOAP HTTP trigger.

properties.name: soap.jms.sender
properties.description: Sender queue used by the VRP SOAP-over-JMS trigger.

properties.name: soap.jms.receiver
properties.description: Receiver queue used by the VRP SOAP-over-JMS trigger.

properties.name: soap.jms.async
properties.description: Whether VRP SOAP-over-JMS is simulated as asynchronous.

properties.name: execution.retry.count
properties.description: Maximum retry count for execution operations.

properties.name: execution.wait.ms
properties.description: Wait interval in milliseconds between execution retries.

properties.name: payload.base.dir
properties.description: Deterministic payload base directory for regression templates. Supports filesystem paths or classpath: prefixes.

properties.name: payload.default.file
properties.description: Default payload file, resolved relative to payload.base.dir, used when a request does not specify one.

properties.name: payload.manifest.file
properties.description: Payload catalog manifest file, resolved relative to payload.base.dir.

properties.name: unified.trace.report.enabled
properties.description: Whether the gateway emits the unified trace report.

properties.name: platform.report.enabled
properties.description: Whether the gateway emits the new unified platform report beside existing outputs.

properties.name: jms.provider
properties.description: JMS provider mode used by the execution flow.

properties.name: jms.default.async
properties.description: Default async mode when JMS is invoked through the generic execution trigger.

properties.name: jms.simulation.consumer.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JMS simulation consumer is enabled.

properties.name: jms.simulation.retry.count
properties.description: Maximum retry count for JMS simulation processing.

properties.name: jms.simulation.processing.delay.ms
properties.description: Simulated JMS processing delay in milliseconds.

properties.name: jms.simulation.retry.delay.ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between JMS simulation retries.

properties.name: jms.simulation.log-analyzer.enabled
properties.description: Whether JMS simulation triggers log analysis.

properties.name: ems.host
properties.description: EMS host used for queue-based execution.

properties.name: ems.port
properties.description: EMS port used for queue-based execution.

properties.name: ems.user
properties.description: EMS username.

properties.name: ems.password
properties.description: EMS password.

properties.name: ems.queue.sender
properties.description: EMS sender queue.

properties.name: ems.queue.receiver
properties.description: EMS receiver queue.

properties.name: rabbitmq.simulation.enabled
properties.description: Whether RabbitMQ simulation mode is enabled.

properties.name: rabbitmq.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange used by the execution flow.

properties.name: rabbitmq.routing.key
properties.description: RabbitMQ routing key used by the execution flow.

properties.name: rabbitmq.queue.receiver
properties.description: RabbitMQ receiver queue used by the execution flow.

properties.name: system.jms.enabled
properties.description: Whether JMS execution is enabled in the gateway.

properties.name: system.rest.enabled
properties.description: Whether REST execution is enabled in the gateway.

properties.name: system.soap.enabled
properties.description: Whether SOAP execution is enabled in the gateway.

properties.name: system.rabbitmq.enabled
properties.description: Whether RabbitMQ execution is enabled in the gateway.
